description: S&P Global provides financial, commodity, ratings, and market data products across its business divisions. Its public web properties describe API-based access to Market Intelligence and Energy datasets and related marketplace metadata.
summary: spglobal.com exposes documented HTTP APIs for S&P Global Energy and S&P Global Market Intelligence/XpressAPI, including a Capital IQ authentication API plus Marketplace Catalog and Screener REST APIs; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: S&P Global Market Intelligence XpressAPI Screener
